label: reference

card.title: Add a generic debounce() utility with cancel + flush
card.description: Provide a typed debounce helper used across the dashboard's input handlers.
card.technicalNotes: Pure function, no deps. Must support trailing invocation, .cancel(), and .flush(). Include JSDoc and unit tests.
isc: Exports a debounce(fn, wait) function returning a debounced callable
Debounced callable exposes .cancel() that prevents a pending call
Debounced callable exposes .flush() that invokes immediately if pending
Unit tests cover trailing call, cancel, and flush behaviours
